content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "工作問題：進度延遲",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "老闆，不好意思，這個任務的進度有點延遲。",
          "pinyin": "Lǎobǎn, bùhǎoyìsi, zhège rènwù de jìndù yǒudiǎn yánchí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Lao3ban3, bu4hao3yi4si5, zhe4ge4 ren4wu4 de5 jin4du4 you3dian3 yan2chi2.",
          "translation_en": "Boss, I'm sorry, the progress on this task is a bit delayed.",
          "translation_ko": "사장님, 죄송합니다. 이 작업의 진행이 조금 지연되었습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "為什麼？你原本說這個星期五可以完成。",
          "pinyin": "Wèishénme? Nǐ yuánběn shuō zhège xīngqíwǔ kěyǐ wánchéng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wei4shen2me5? Ni3 yuan2ben3 shuo1 zhe4ge4 xing1qi2wu3 ke3yi3 wan2cheng2.",
          "translation_en": "Why? You originally said it could be completed this Friday.",
          "translation_ko": "왜요? 원래 이번 주 금요일에 완료할 수 있다고 하셨잖아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "因為同事給我的資料晚了兩天，所以我需要延長到星期一。",
          "pinyin": "Yīnwèi tóngshì gěi wǒ de zīliào wǎn le liǎng tiān, suǒyǐ wǒ xūyào yáncháng dào xīngqíyī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yin1wei4 tong2shi4 gei3 wo3 de5 zi1liao4 wan3 le5 liang3 tian1, suo3yi3 wo3 xu1yao4 yan2chang2 dao4 xing1qi2yi1.",
          "translation_en": "Because my colleague gave me the data two days late, so I need to extend it to Monday.",
          "translation_ko": "동료가 저에게 자료를 이틀 늦게 줘서, 월요일까지 연장해야 합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好吧，那星期一早上一定要給我。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo ba, nà xīngqíyī zǎoshang yīdìng yào gěi wǒ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 ba5, na4 xing1qi2yi1 zao3shang4 yi1ding4 yao4 gei3 wo3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, then you must give it to me on Monday morning.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 월요일 아침에 꼭 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒問題，謝謝老闆。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, xièxiè lǎobǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, xie4xie4 lao3ban3.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, thank you boss.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 사장님 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why is the task delayed?",
          "question_ko": "작업이 지연된 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["The boss changed the deadline", "The colleague gave data late", "The employee was sick"],
          "options_ko": ["사장님이 마감일을 바꿨다", "동료가 자료를 늦게 줬다", "직원이 아팠다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of apology and explanation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are the employee. Explain to your boss why your task is delayed and propose a new deadline."
    },
    {
      "title": "退貨：尺寸不合",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想退貨。這件上衣尺寸不合。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng tuìhuò. Zhè jiàn shàngyī chǐcùn bù hé.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 tui4huo4. Zhe4 jian4 shang4yi1 chi3cun4 bu4 he2.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to return this. The size of this top doesn't fit.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 환불하고 싶습니다. 이 상의 사이즈가 맞지 않습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "不好意思，請問您有帶購買證明嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bùhǎoyìsi, qǐngwèn nín yǒu dài gòumǎi zhèngmíng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4hao3yi4si5, qing3wen4 nin2 you3 dai4 gou4mai3 zheng4ming2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "I'm sorry, do you have the proof of purchase?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 구매 증명서를 가지고 계신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "有，這是發票。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhè shì fāpiào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4 shi4 fa1piao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, here is the receipt.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기 영수증입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，我幫您處理。不過，退貨需要七天內，您昨天買的，沒問題。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín chǔlǐ. Búguò, tuìhuò xūyào qī tiān nèi, nín zuótiān mǎi de, méi wèntí.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 bang1 nin2 chu3li3. Bu2guo4, tui4huo4 xu1yao4 qi1 tian1 nei4, nin2 zuo2tian1 mai3 de5, mei2 wen4ti2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll handle it for you. However, returns need to be within seven days. You bought it yesterday, so no problem.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 처리해 드리겠습니다. 하지만 환불은 7일 이내에 가능합니다. 어제 구매하셨으니 문제없습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "太好了，謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4xie4 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Great, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요, 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why does the customer want to return the item?",
          "question_ko": "손님이 물건을 환불하려는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["The color is wrong", "The size doesn't fit", "The item is damaged"],
          "options_ko": ["색상이 잘못됐다", "사이즈가 맞지 않는다", "물건이 손상됐다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on polite request and confirmation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are the store clerk. Ask the customer for the receipt and explain the return policy."
    },
    {
      "title": "意見：選擇餐廳",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們晚上要去哪裡吃飯？你有什麼想法？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen wǎnshàng yào qù nǎlǐ chīfàn? Nǐ yǒu shénme xiǎngfǎ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3men5 wan3shang4 yao4 qu4 na3li3 chi1fan4? Ni3 you3 shen2me5 xiang3fa3?",
          "translation_en": "Where should we go for dinner tonight? What do you think?",
          "translation_ko": "저녁에 어디로 밥 먹으러 갈까요? 어떻게 생각하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我認為吃牛肉麵不錯，可是你覺得呢？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ rènwéi chī niúròumiàn búcuò, kěshì nǐ juéde ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ren4wei2 chi1 niu2rou4mian4 bu2cuo4, ke3shi4 ni3 jue2de5 ne5?",
          "translation_en": "I think beef noodles are good, but what do you think?",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수가 괜찮다고 생각하는데, 당신은 어떻게 생각하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我同意你的看法，牛肉麵很好吃。不過，我比較想吃水餃。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ, niúròumiàn hěn hǎochī. Búguò, wǒ bǐjiào xiǎng chī shuǐjiǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 tong2yi4 ni3 de5 kan4fa3, niu2rou4mian4 hen3 hao3chi1. Bu2guo4, wo3 bi3jiao4 xiang3 chi1 shui3jiao3.",
          "translation_en": "I agree with you, beef noodles are delicious. However, I'd rather eat dumplings.",
          "translation_ko": "당신 의견에 동의합니다. 소고기 국수는 정말 맛있어요. 하지만 저는 만두를 더 먹고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "水餃也可以啊！那我們去吃水餃吧。",
          "pinyin": "Shuǐjiǎo yě kěyǐ a! Nà wǒmen qù chī shuǐjiǎo ba.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Shui3jiao3 ye3 ke3yi3 a5! Na4 wo3men5 qu4 chi1 shui3jiao3 ba5.",
          "translation_en": "Dumplings are fine too! Then let's go eat dumplings.",
          "translation_ko": "만두도 괜찮네요! 그럼 만두 먹으러 가요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，就這麼決定。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, jiù zhème juédìng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5, jiu4 zhe4me5 jue2ding4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, it's decided.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그렇게 결정합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What do they finally decide to eat?",
          "question_ko": "그들은 최종적으로 무엇을 먹기로 결정했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodles", "Dumplings", "Rice"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수", "만두", "밥"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on expressing opinions and reaching agreement.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are discussing dinner plans with a friend. Suggest a restaurant and explain why you prefer it."
    }
  ]
}
